title: Little Fish: The Cat Is Banging On The Door
content:
Your ad-free Little Fish this week!

Dan, James and Andy discuss YOUR facts, including soccer, snacks and Stonehenge. We discover which of us has an alter-ego called 'Struggle Cop'. And we name eight more Friend of the Podcast fact custodians.
